plan_overview: Implement a 'Paragraphing Mode' that allows users to format text by 'stamping' markers from a reference text using a ghost marker at the caret and the Enter key.
technical_context: Uses Lexical editor. Requires caret-position tracking for the ghost UI. Integrates with existing Reference Pane state. Uses a Reduce/Pipe pattern for stripping markers (Clean Slate).

steps: Define ParagraphingContext state (isActive, queue, currentIndex, history)
Add helper functions for stamp, skip, and undo actions

tasks.description: Implement Marker Extraction and Stripping Utilities
steps: Create extractMarkersFromSerialized utility to build the queue from reference nodes
Create stripMarkersFromSerialized utility to remove structural markers from target nodes
Add unit tests for both utilities
Implement a portal-based component that tracks the caret position
Render the current marker from the queue with low opacity
Add a small tooltip for reference context (verse number)
Register KEY_ENTER_COMMAND, KEY_TAB_COMMAND, and Arrow key listeners
Intercept commands when Paragraphing Mode is active to trigger context actions

tasks.description: Integrate Paragraphing Mode into Editor UI
steps: Add a toggle button to the editor toolbar
Implement the 'Clean Slate' confirmation prompt when entering the mode
Ensure the mode can be toggled off safely
Add a floating 'Stamp' button for mobile/touch interfaces
Perform final E2E testing of the workflow
